title: crazy optimizated
description: Crazy Optimized is a powerful Minecraft optimization mod that boosts FPS and reduces lag for smoother gameplay.
body:
FPS+ Performance Modpack – From Laggy to Lightning Fast

This modpack is designed to transform your Minecraft experience from stuttering 60 FPS to a crystal-clear 300+ FPS. Perfect for players who want the smoothest possible gameplay without sacrificing the look and feel of vanilla Minecraft.

Features

Powerful optimization mods to boost FPS across all systems

Built-in support for Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, and other top-tier performance mods

Clean, vanilla-friendly experience – no gameplay changes, just pure speed
